name: Mario
hints: From: Video Games (Super Mario)
About: A cheerful mustache-wearing Italian plumber who regularly traverses the Mushroom Kingdom to rescue a princess from a turtle king.

name: Pikachu
hints: From: Video Games (Pokémon)
About: An iconic yellow rodent creature that stores high-voltage electrical energy inside its red cheeks.

name: Sonic the Hedgehog
hints: From: Video Games (Sonic series)
About: A blue hedgehog capable of traveling at supersonic speed to thwart a round robot-building scientist.

name: Link
hints: From: Video Games (The Legend of Zelda)
About: The green-clad elven Champion of Hyrule who protects the Triforce using the Master Sword.

name: Master Chief
hints: From: Video Games (Halo)
About: An augmented Spartan super-soldier clad in green armor who defends humanity against alien networks alongside an AI partner.

name: Kratos
hints: From: Video Games (God of War)
About: A scarred Spartan warrior who tore through the Greek pantheon before heading north to raise his son.

name: Cloud Strife
hints: From: Video Games (Final Fantasy VII)
About: A spiky-haired mercenary with a giant Buster Sword battling an eco-destroying power company and a legendary soldier.

name: Solid Snake
hints: From: Video Games (Metal Gear Solid)
About: An elite infiltration operative famous for crawling inside cardboard boxes and stopping bipedal nuclear tanks.

name: Lara Croft
hints: From: Video Games (Tomb Raider)
About: An athletic British archaeologist who braves ancient hazards and traps around the globe to protect relics.

name: Steve
hints: From: Video Games (Minecraft)
About: A silent, blocky explorer who builds structures and fights explosive green entities in an endless pixel landscape.

name: Geralt of Rivia
hints: From: Video Games (The Witcher)
About: A mutated, white-haired monster tracker for hire who uses dual swords and simple tracking signs.

name: Arthur Morgan
hints: From: Video Games (Red Dead Redemption 2)
About: A reliable outlaw struggling with loyalty, morality, and terminal illness during the decline of the Wild West.

name: Nathan Drake
hints: From: Video Games (Uncharted)
About: A witty treasure hunter who survives historical gunfights, collapsing bridges, and ancient puzzles.

name: Ezio Auditore da Firenze
hints: From: Video Games (Assassin's Creed)
About: An Italian nobleman who scales Renaissance cities using hidden wrist blades to avenge his family.

name: Leon S. Kennedy
hints: From: Video Games (Resident Evil)
About: A rookie cop who survived a biological outbreak and became a federal agent sent to rescue the president's daughter.

name: Doomguy / Doom Slayer
hints: From: Video Games (DOOM)
About: A silent, un-stoppable marine who rips and tears through hordes of hellish entities using an arsenal of heavy firearms.

name: Samus Aran
hints: From: Video Games (Metroid)
About: A silent bounty hunter who explores alien catacombs using a high-tech arm-cannon suit that shapes into a ball.

name: Ryu
hints: From: Video Games (Street Fighter)
About: A wandering martial artist in a white gi searching for the true meaning of combat through energy fireball strikes.

name: Scorpion
hints: From: Video Games (Mortal Kombat)
About: A hell-spawned ninja wraith who pulls opponents toward him using a spear line while yelling for them to approach.

name: Sub-Zero
hints: From: Video Games (Mortal Kombat)
About: A deadly Grandmaster assassin who manipulates ice to freeze his fighting targets solid.

name: Pac-Man
hints: From: Video Games (Pac-Man)
About: A circular yellow icon who maneuvers through neon corridors eating dots while escaping a quartet of colorful ghosts.

name: Sans
hints: From: Video Games (Undertale)
About: A lazy skeleton comic who judges your sins and triggers a brutally fast glowing-eye battle if you clear out his world.

name: Ellie
hints: From: Video Games (The Last of Us)
About: A resourceful girl immune to a fungal plague who navigates a bleak post-outbreak world on a quest for vengeance.

name: Joel Miller
hints: From: Video Games (The Last of Us)
About: A hardened smuggler devastated by personal loss who acts as a protective father figure across a broken territory.

name: Sephiroth
hints: From: Video Games (Final Fantasy VII)
About: A tragic, silver-haired elite war hero wielding an impossibly long katana who attempts to ascend as a god.

name: Donkey Kong
hints: From: Video Games (Donkey Kong)
About: A powerful, tie-wearing gorilla who smashes barrels and protects his massive hoard of bananas.

name: Bowser
hints: From: Video Games (Super Mario)
About: The fire-breathing, spike-shelled King of the Koopas who constantly captures royal targets.

name: Princess Peach
hints: From: Video Games (Super Mario)
About: The pink-clad monarch of the Mushroom Kingdom who uses floating jumps and parasols.

name: Luigi
hints: From: Video Games (Super Mario)
About: A nervous, green-clad taller brother who uses a custom vacuum pack to clear ghosts from haunted mansions.

name: Crash Bandicoot
hints: From: Video Games (Crash Bandicoot)
About: A hyperactive, spinning marsupial who smashes fruit crates to stop the operations of an evil scientist.

name: Spyro the Dragon
hints: From: Video Games (Spyro)
About: A small purple dragon who glides through fantasy realms roasting gems and freeing elder dragons.

name: Agent 47
hints: From: Video Games (Hitman)
About: A bald, cloned contract assassin with a barcode stamped on the back of his neck who uses seamless disguises.

name: Commander Shepard
hints: From: Video Games (Mass Effect)
About: An elite starship commander who rallies an inter-species crew to stop an extinction cycle by giant machines.

name: Garrus Vakarian
hints: From: Video Games (Mass Effect)
About: A vigilant, blue-armored alien sniper who loves calibrating weapon tracking software mid-flight.

name: Ciri
hints: From: Video Games (The Witcher)
About: A gray-haired royal heir possessing elder blood that allows her to warp space and jump dimensions.

name: John Marston
hints: From: Video Games (Red Dead Redemption)
About: A scarred former gang hunter forced by agents to eliminate his old brothers-in-arms to secure his family.

name: Gordon Freeman
hints: From: Video Games (Half-Life)
About: A silent research physicist who battles dimensional alien incursions using a signature hazard suit and a crowbar.

name: GLaDOS
hints: From: Video Games (Portal)
About: A passive-aggressive AI system that forces test subjects through portals using promises of cake.

name: Chell
hints: From: Video Games (Portal)
About: A silent test subject in an orange jumpsuit who outsmarts an AI facility using a spatial portal gun.

name: Chun-Li
hints: From: Video Games (Street Fighter)
About: An Interpol agent with exceptionally strong legs who fights to dismantle an underworld syndicate.

name: Dante
hints: From: Video Games (Devil May Cry)
About: A cocky half-demon investigator in a red trench coat who cycles through swords and dual pistols to hunt monsters.

name: Vergil
hints: From: Video Games (Devil May Cry)
About: A cold, blue-clad half-demon swordsman obsessed with obtaining more power using his spatial blade Yamato.

name: Niko Bellic
hints: From: Video Games (Grand Theft Auto IV)
About: An Eastern European war veteran who comes to Liberty City seeking an elusive war betrayer.

name: Trevor Philips
hints: From: Video Games (Grand Theft Auto V)
About: An unhinged, highly volatile former military pilot who runs a chaotic desert crime operation.

name: CJ (Carl Johnson)
hints: From: Video Games (Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas)
About: A gang member who returns home to Los Santos to clean up his neighborhood and avenge his mother.

name: Marcus Fenix
hints: From: Video Games (Gears of War)
About: A gruff, armored soldier leading squad assaults against subterranean monster swarms using a chainsaw rifle.

name: Sylvanas Windrunner
hints: From: Video Games (World of Warcraft)
About: A fallen ranger commander turned banshee queen who ruled over an undead faction before altering the afterlife.

name: Illidan Stormrage
hints: From: Video Games (World of Warcraft)
About: A blind elf demon hunter wielding twin curved blades who spent ten thousand years locked away for his choice of power.

name: Shadowheart
hints: From: Video Games (Baldur's Gate 3)
About: A secretive cleric of a dark goddess carrying a mysterious spatial artifact while hiding her memory-wiped past.

name: Astarion
hints: From: Video Games (Baldur's Gate 3)
About: A flamboyant, white-haired high elf vampire spawn who enjoys a newly found freedom from his cruel master.

aliases.name: Mega Man
hints: From: Video Games (Mega Man)
About: A blue robot who fights against Dr. Wily's evil robots and copies the weapons of his defeated enemies.

aliases.name: Kirby
hints: From: Video Games (Kirby)
About: A cheerful pink puffball who inhales enemies to copy their abilities, protecting Dream Land from various threats.

aliases.name: Sam Fisher
hints: From: Video Games (Splinter Cell)
About: A covert operative for the NSA, skilled in stealth, infiltration, and using advanced optical technology.

aliases.name: Banjo & Kazooie
hints: From: Video Games (Banjo-Kazooie)
About: A bear and his bird sidekick who travel through magical worlds to stop a wicked witch's plans.

aliases.name: Rayman
hints: From: Video Games (Rayman)
About: A limbless, cartoonish hero with helicopter hair, who protects the Glade of Dreams from evil.

aliases.name: Bomberman
hints: From: Video Games (Bomberman)
About: A white robot who lays explosive bombs and navigates mazes to defeat enemies and clear stages.

aliases.name: Simon Belmont
hints: From: Video Games (Castlevania)
About: A vampire hunter with a magical whip, dedicated to vanquishing Dracula and his forces of darkness.

aliases.name: Alucard
hints: From: Video Games (Castlevania)
About: The half-vampire son of Dracula who fights against his father's evil, wielding a sword and dark magic.

aliases.name: Shovel Knight
hints: From: Video Games (Shovel Knight)
About: An armored knight who wields a shovel as a weapon, digging, digging, and digging his way to victory.

aliases.name: Cuphead
hints: From: Video Games (Cuphead)
About: A cup-headed character who runs and shoots through surreal cartoon worlds after making a deal with the devil.

aliases.name: Ori

About: A white guardian spirit who embarks on a journey through a dying forest to save its inhabitants.

aliases.name: The Knight
hints: From: Video Games (Hollow Knight)
About: A silent, bug-like warrior who explores a ruined kingdom, wielding a nail and uncovering its dark secrets.

aliases.name: Aloy

About: A skilled hunter and archer in a world overrun by robotic creatures, who uncovers the truth about her origins.

aliases.name: Jin Sakai
hints: From: Video Games (Ghost of Tsushima)

aliases.name: Cal Kestis
hints: From: Video Games (Star Wars Jedi)
About: A Jedi Padawan who survives Order 66 and goes on a quest to rebuild the Jedi Order while escaping the Empire.

aliases.name: Ratchet & Clank
hints: From: Video Games (Ratchet & Clank)
About: A Lombax and his robot companion who travel across the galaxy, saving planets with an arsenal of outrageous weapons.

aliases.name: Jak & Daxter
hints: From: Video Games (Jak & Daxter)
About: A human and his ottsel friend who journey through time and space to stop a global conspiracy.

aliases.name: Sly Cooper
hints: From: Video Games (Sly Cooper)
About: A raccoon thief who uses stealth and acrobatics to pull off heists, carrying on his family's legacy.

aliases.name: Duke Nukem
hints: From: Video Games (Duke Nukem)
About: A muscle-bound action hero with a one-liner for every situation, fighting aliens and saving the world.

aliases.name: Serious Sam
hints: From: Video Games (Serious Sam)
About: A loud, boisterous soldier who battles hordes of enemies in ancient Egypt and alien worlds.

aliases.name: Max Payne
hints: From: Video Games (Max Payne)

aliases.name: Alan Wake

About: A bestselling author who discovers that his horror stories are coming to life, trapped in a nightmare town.

aliases.name: Booker DeWitt

aliases.name: Elizabeth
hints: From: Video Games (BioShock Infinite)
About: A woman with the ability to open tears between dimensions, held captive for her incredible powers.

aliases.name: Sekiro

About: A one-armed shinobi who fights to rescue his master, using a prosthetic arm filled with deadly tools.

aliases.name: Jin Kazama
hints: From: Video Games (Tekken)

aliases.name: Kazuya Mishima
hints: From: Video Games (Tekken)
About: Jin's father and a ruthless fighter possessed by the Devil, seeking world domination.

aliases.name: Heihachi Mishima
hints: From: Video Games (Tekken)
About: The iron-fisted patriarch of the Mishima family, a martial arts master who survived countless betrayals.

aliases.name: Sora
hints: From: Video Games (Kingdom Hearts)
About: A Keyblade wielder who travels across Disney and Final Fantasy worlds to fight the Heartless.

aliases.name: Riku

About: Sora's childhood friend and rival, who struggles with the darkness before finding his own path.

aliases.name: Shulk

aliases.name: Joker

aliases.name: Morgana

About: A mysterious cat-like creature who mentors the Phantom Thieves and transforms into a van.

aliases.name: Phoenix Wright
hints: From: Video Games (Ace Attorney)
About: A defence attorney known for his
and for uncovering the truth in the courtroom.

aliases.name: Kat

About: A woman who manipulates gravity to fly and fight, protecting a floating city from monsters.

About: A heroic earthworm in a robotic suit who fights aliens and saves princesses.

About: A foul-mouthed squirrel who drinks, swears, and battles a giant singing poop.

aliases.name: Bayonetta
hints: From: Video Games (Bayonetta)
About: A witch who uses her hair to summon demons and fights angelic beings with stylish combos.

About: An elite S.T.A.R.S. officer who survives the Mansion Incident and later fights against a bioterrorist organization.

About: A former pilot who becomes a member of S.T.A.R.S. and leads the fight against bioterrorism across the globe.

About: A fairy-like companion who serves as the Traveler's guide, always hungry and always talking.

About: A narcissistic, megalomaniacal corporate CEO who sees himself as the hero of his own story.

About: A hyperactive, one-wheeled robot who is obsessed with stairs, doors, and being the center of attention.
